ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the vehicle (e.g., Hatchback, Sedan) */,
  "charges" TEXT /* Rental charges for the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make or brand of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Specific model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the vehicle */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses (e.g., petrol, diesel) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at the time of the last service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental package */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the package */,
  "package_info" TEXT /* Information about the rental package (e.g., mileage, schedule) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the rental package */,
  "mileage_limit" INTEGER /* Mileage limit included in the package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the rental package */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applicable to the package */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the rental package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_packages_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "included_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each included service */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental package associated with the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the included service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the included service */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Whether the service is optional or mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_included_services_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES rental_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extras" (
  "extra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extra */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental package associated with the extra */,
  "extra_description" TEXT /* Description of the extra available */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the extra */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Whether the extra is optional or mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extras_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES rental_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being reserved */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reservation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reservation */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the reservation */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental package chosen */,
  "extra_ids" TEXT /* List of extra IDs chosen by the customer */,
  "service_ids" TEXT /* List of service IDs chosen by the customer */,
  "cancellation_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cancellation policy applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_cancellation_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancellation_policy_id") REFERENCES cancellation_policy ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES rental_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the reservation */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "paid_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the vehicle (e.g., available, booked) */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* The date when the vehicle was last serviced */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the vehicle */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Next service due date */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the vehicle's service records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_status_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation associated with the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellation_policy" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation policy */,
  "fee_percentage" REAL /* Percentage fee charged for cancellation */,
  "notice_period" TEXT /* Notice period required for cancellation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the policy is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)
